testcase.name: ping_shouldReturn201

failure.message: Failed to parse the JSON document

testcase.failure: io.restassured.path.json.exception.JsonPathException: Failed to parse the JSON document at io.restassured.path.json.JsonPath$ExceptionCatcher.invoke(JsonPath.java:1002) at
